title: thesium linophyllon subsp. montanum
intro: Thesium linophyllon subsp. montanum, also known as the mountain thyme, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Thymelaeaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to soothe and calm various health issues. The health benefits of Thesium linophyllon subsp. montanum include its ability to reduce stress, improve respiratory issues, and support the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, often used to promote relaxation, ease congestion, and support overall well-being.
